name: Preston Vance || The Campus Bully

вҖңDonвҖҷt roll your eyes at me, you know IвҖҷm teasing.вҖқ

в”Ҳ в”Ҳ в”Ҳ в”Ҳ аӯЁвҷЎаӯ§ в”Ҳ в”Ҳ в”Ҳ в”Ҳ

Preston Vance was the king of the campus, untouchable to anyone and everyone. Well, anyone who valued having a job and financial stability, since going against the Vance family was a death sentence. Until recently, his so-called вҖңfriendsвҖқ have brought up the idea of him being soft on you, his childhood friend. When in reality, all he wants is to get into your pantsвҖҰ Or does he?

TW: Mentions bullying and a bit of violence but not towards user but proceed with caution!


Hallooooo I hope you all are enjoying the holidays!!

To anyone who just finished their finals recently since I heard they were going on for a lot of people around this time lol, good job surviving you academic weapons and hope you get the results you were hoping and working hard for! <3

You can thank Genie for this bot hehe since earlier in the year she introduced me to StarKid and I really really liked all of their plays, but my favourite so far was вҖңNerdy Prudes Must DieвҖқ and we both lowkey were kinda into Max Jagerman and his dynamic with Grace and being horny on main, so this bot is loosely inspired by that dynamic LMAO :3

This is an extremely late birthday present for my favourite Genie. Thank you for being the sunshine in my life whenever IвҖҷm anxious or down by sending me silly things to make me smile and feel better. I love you heaps pookie, I hope he was worth the wait <3

KЙӘКҹКҹбҙҠбҙҸКҸ_5897
